meta.title: ICD-9 Procedures — Cardiac Surgery, Cardiac ICU, Thoracic & Vascular Surgery (Extended)
meta.note: Extended list for cardiac surgery, cardiac intensive care, thoracic surgery, and vascular surgery. Includes interventional cardiology procedures, detailed hierarchies, and non-cardiac thoracic operations. Sub-levels (e.g., .01, .02) are simulated for clinical detail where applicable.
